{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231629346B7B52EA983D887C422E"}"},"total":488},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504251518392058648","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这篇小说，已经完全脱离了番茄的快热小说方式，让人看的很舒服，目前我看到了100章，也是想在这个节骨眼评论，作者把握度把握的很好，很多设计很新颖，希望以后番茄可以以这本小说为借鉴开个新的慢热流派，而不是无敌打天下，希望作者可以越来越好👌🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747222919,"group_id":"7478580337736420414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最触手可及的理想，隔着一山一海的距离","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxXvVUCYUcT8I8y46IBjeDf8RiIaVBcPbnMivYDIBvXX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ab46fcf340542699bb9bbbbf0aec29c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796747&x-signature=pUgBEI8bUtYWo6PdDuWUI0xpK0M%3D","user_id":"4281951255275168","user_name":"山中拓海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4281951255275168","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478580337736420414","book_info":{"abstract":"【无金手指】【无系统】【原著西游+洪荒西游混合版本】【非爽文】
孙履真穿越了，穿越到一只猴子身上。
正当他打算渡过自己身为动物短命一生的时候，突然见证了孙悟空的出世。
原来，这竟然是仙佛神魔存在的西游世界。
那么，他该何去何从？
参加佛道争斗？吊打佛教，准提接引圣人？那是拥有金手指，系统主角该干的事情，孙履真可没有金手指和系统。
“不管如何，先求个长生不老，做个能够逍遥亿万年的神仙再说吧。”
拜师菩提祖师，求得长生不老，这是孙履真的第一个目标，如果连这个都做不到，就别提什么参加西游，佛道气运争斗了。
曾为寿元不过百年的现代人，若能够过上逍遥亿万年的神仙生活，这可是在现代无论如何都做不到的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o52fbffad6d2e174fb6281e174ce9b1c4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"山海青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"7478580337736420414","book_name":"西游：我是花果山一只猴子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7478581198940275262","read_count":"10647","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1591591"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"555","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aee2d4570a454c3430c55af81fb3ec46~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438574&x-signature=eal6jI%2BRtMTUj8niflnBa1QxgAY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2225884079596263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"122"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231629346B7B52EA983D887C422E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15102,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13525},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490504017412916030","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看过的满分小说之一，最大的优点就是世界观做的很完美，但到后面感觉容易崩因为他的世界观做的太大了很难写下去希望后面作者能坚持住吧。最认可的就是作者写出的佛教、道教或是天庭都不是带有主观色彩而是从客观上描述的，没有主观的去贬低谁，而是就事论事
最后希望作者能再保证数量的同时还保证质量吧。



更的实在太少了[求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744023239,"group_id":"7478580337736420414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxn60yPZRoeVkUiuXS1RbQFwCnM0K+rdcMaw9AGXxhfw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3598045824950120","user_name":"爱吃会宁胡麻油的龙羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3598045824950120","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478580337736420414","book_info":{"abstract":"【无金手指】【无系统】【原著西游+洪荒西游混合版本】【非爽文】

正当他打算渡过自己身为动物短命一生的时候，突然见证了孙悟空的出世。
